message:
test(core): property-based tests for restore_process and restore_scrollback

Adds 39 new proptest + unit tests across 2 modules:
- proptest_restore_process (18 tests): LaunchConfig serde/defaults, LaunchAction tagged enum serde with snake_case tags, ProcessPlan/LaunchResult/LaunchReport serde roundtrips
- proptest_restore_scrollback (21 tests): InjectionConfig serde/defaults, ScrollbackData from_segments byte counting, truncation keeps most recent lines, truncation idempotence, InjectionReport aggregation methods

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
